articles.author: Lisa Eadicicco, Clare Duffy
articles.title: Meta to cut 10% of staff as it pours billions into AI - CNN
articles.description: Meta said on Thursday it plans to lay off roughly 10% of its workforce, or about 8,000 people, the latest in a string of tech industry layoffs fueled in part by artificial intelligence.
articles.content:

articles.title: Eight months early and under budget, the Roman Telescope is ready to launch - Ars Technica
articles.description: Spy satellite hardware has been repurposed to scan the Universe in the infrared.
